description_long: This hammer features a robust, oversized head with a glowing, semi-transparent orange material that suggests it is either heated or made from a crystalline substance. The head is blocky and angular, with a prominent cylindrical protrusion at the front and several smaller geometric accents, giving it a high-tech or fantasy appearance. The handle is long, straight, and wrapped in a dark blue and brown grip, possibly leather or synthetic, with a metallic ring at the base for hanging or attaching a lanyard. The central shaft appears reinforced, and the transition between the head and handle is marked by a circular emblem or mechanical detail. The hammer's overall design is both functional and ornamental, with a striking contrast between the glowing head and the matte handle. No visible signs of wear or branding are present, and the object appears pristine and well-crafted.
description: A large, glowing orange hammer with a blocky, crystalline head and a long, dark blue and brown handle, featuring mechanical and ornamental details.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from the side, highlighting the glowing orange head with its angular, blocky shape and the cylindrical front protrusion, as well as the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed head-on, showing the flat striking face and the symmetrical, geometric accents on the sides of the head.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the same glowing head and handle, with the mechanical emblem visible at the junction between head and handle.
description_view_3: The hammer is seen from the rear, displaying the back of the head and the circular detail at the base of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle with a dark blue synthetic leather grip and brown wrapping, featuring a metallic ring at the base for attachment.
attribute_head_type: Blocky, oversized sledge-type head made of glowing orange crystalline material, with a cylindrical striking face and geometric accents.
